items.title: Why Home Depot (HD) Outpaced the Stock Market Today
items.description: Home Depot (HD) closed the most recent trading day at $396, moving +2.19% from the previous trading session.

items.title: Home Depot (HD) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
items.description: Home Depot (HD) possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

items.title: Will Appliance & Building Material Sales Keep Lifting Home Depot's Q2?
items.description: HD's Pro-driven appliance and building material sales are likely to aid steady Q2 results despite macro pressures.

items.title: Shares of retail companies are trading higher amid overall market strength following softer-than-expected year-over-year CPI figures and in-line month-over-month figures. The sector may be seeing strength after President Trump extended the tariff truce deadline with China by 90 days.
Home Depot to close Missouri distribution center
items.description: The retailer will stock inventory at other facilities following the Oct. 26 closure, which impacts 61 employees.
